site.title: Interactive Guide
site.subtitle: Answer a few questions and we'll guide you through.

welcomePopup.title: Welcome
welcomePopup.body: This is a popup that shows on first load. Toggle it off in the admin panel.

start.title: Let's get started
start.body:
Welcome to the guide. This is the **first step**. You can use _markdown_ here, including:

- Lists
- [Links](https://example.com)
- `inline code`
- Images, videos, and code blocks

What best describes you?

confirmPopup.title: Skip ahead?
confirmPopup.body: You'll skip the explanation and jump straight to the result.

newbie.title: Welcome, beginner

intermediate.title: Nice — let's narrow it down
intermediate.body: What are you trying to do?

advanced.title: Quick answer
advanced.body: Here is the recommended path. Customize this content from the admin panel.
advanced.warning: Make sure you actually need this — if unsure, restart and answer the questions.

result-a.title: Recommendation A
result-a.body:
Based on your answers, **here's what to do next**.

You can embed videos by pasting a YouTube/Vimeo link on its own line:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

result-b.title: Recommendation B
result-b.body: Here's a different path tailored to your answers. Edit this in the admin panel.
result-b.warning: Heads up: this option has some caveats — read carefully.
